name: @wvanderen/bmad-module-td
description: BMAD expansion module for td CLI integration - td provides state, BMAD provides structure
author: BMad Method

scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:prerelease: npm version prerelease && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run format:check
